formBoostToast: We matched your exploration to interest lanes—you can change these.

constellationReveal.label: Unlocked
constellationReveal.title: SCS Platform Magazine
constellationReveal.body: You explored all six signals. Here is Issue 01 — competitive temperature, market opportunity sketch, Vibe Code Craft, and your personalized session read.
constellationReveal.laneDisclosure: Interest lanes below are pre-matched from your exploration
constellationReveal.footnote: Private session artifact · planning research · not investment advice

bar.title: Value
bar.subtitle: Why voice should run all week—not just demo week
bar.heroLabel: Built so you can keep it on after the pilot ends

benchmarkRows.note: Typical assistant workload for a small business
Industry benchmark for human phone support

validationRows.label: The gap
validationRows.value: Roughly 40× less overhead than sending every call to a staffed line—even at full depth

validationRows.label: Your week
validationRows.value: Catch missed calls and no-shows without adding a front desk for peak hours

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Planning estimates from private tests; your volume and workflows will differ

bar.insight: Most voice pilots fail when the novelty fades and the run rate does not fit real life. We optimized for something you can leave on through Monday morning—not a booth demo you turn off Sunday night.
footnotes: Comparative estimates, not a price quote

aura.title: Aura
aura.subtitle: Response time · does it feel human?
aura.heroLabel: Target median response in conversation tests

validationRows.label: Bench runs
validationRows.value: Instrumented conversation tests across hundreds of turns

validationRows.label: Current focus
validationRows.value: Closing the gap on the slowest turns—where bots usually break trust

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Lab and pilot metrics; not a public uptime SLA yet

aura.insight: Speed is not vanity—it is whether someone finishes the sentence or hangs up. We publish targets because we test against them, not because we have finished tuning every edge case.

radial.title: Radial
radial.subtitle: What you can ask for · one surface

validationRows.label: Your clicks
validationRows.value: Which pillars you open tells us what to prioritize in cohort access

validationRows.label: One door in
validationRows.value: You should not need a different product for each job

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Areas shown are roadmap lanes—not every SKU on day one

radial.insight: Operators do not buy architecture diagrams. They buy fewer tabs and one reliable place to ask. This map is how we listen to what you actually want early access to.

wave.title: Wave
wave.subtitle: Conversation flow · continuous, not choppy
wave.heroLabel: Speak, listen, respond—without the robot pause
wave.benchmarkTitle: What we optimize for in practice

benchmarkRows.note: We do not wait for you to finish typing energy
Work starts while you are still talking
Audio begins before the full answer is done

validationRows.label: Pilot feedback
validationRows.value: Choppy turn-taking is the #1 reason people abandon voice assistants

validationRows.label: Test focus
validationRows.value: End-to-end runs in private pilots—not demo scripts only

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Performance varies by network, device, and call length

wave.insight: The magic is not a single model name—it is that the conversation keeps moving. We built for streaming because people do not talk in batch requests.

grid.title: Grid
grid.subtitle: Reliability · bad day, still works
grid.benchmarkTitle: What yields vs what never does

benchmarkRows.note: The call does not drop mid-sentence
Rich UI yields before voice does

validationRows.label: Stress tests
validationRows.value: Simulated load and weak-network runs in QA

validationRows.label: Design rule
validationRows.value: If something has to give, it is not the conversation

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Extreme conditions may still require a retry

grid.insight: Real operators have bad Wi-Fi, long days, and peak-hour spikes. We degrade the extras before we degrade the call—because trust is the product.

sam.title: S.A.M.
sam.subtitle: Samuel · one agent, your interface
sam.benchmarkTitle: What you get vs what stays hidden

benchmarkRows.note: So you do not manage a tool stack

validationRows.label: Private pilots
validationRows.value: Founder and operator workflows dogfooded first

validationRows.label: Early access
validationRows.value: Read-heavy workflows before anything that moves money alone

validationRows.label: Honest limit
validationRows.value: Scope expands as trust and testing catch up

sam.insight: You should not need a PhD in our stack to get value. Sam is the product face; the machinery stays backstage until you care to ask.
